strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform, showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized AI expertise at principal/director scale
Title trajectory tops out at Staff/Senior; lacks evidence of director-level IC influence or advising strategic customers
No advanced degree in AI and limited cloud-platform strategy experience beyond AWS CDK usage

key_factors.factor: Depth of AI expertise and shipped AI products
Director-level IC scope and external thought leadership
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: The role demands recognized AI expertise, director-level IC influence, and the ability to advise strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption. The candidate shows strong general engineering breadth (15+ years, multiple stacks, founder of GISCollective) and some recent AI-adjacent work via MCP generators at re:cinq, but there is no evidence of AI products at scale, published AI thought leadership, or partner/customer advisory experience. Cloud exposure is limited to AWS CDK in a pricing context rather than platform strategy. Fit is partial — solid senior engineer, but below the Principal/Director bar this role requires.
